items.title: Watch: Why Australia's PM apologised for 'inappropriate' Kylie comments
items.dek: Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has apologised for remarks he made about popstar Kylie Minogue in a podcast interview last week.
items.body: Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has apologised for remarks he made about popstar Kylie Minogue in a podcast interview last week.

items.title: Girl trapped in Venezuela quake 'survived on ketchup and cheese'
items.dek: BBC international correspondent Yogita Limayee meets 12-year-old Fabiana, who was trapped in Venezuela's devastating earthquakes.

items.title: Why Ukrainian strikes on annexed Crimea are a blow to Putin
items.dek: Eastern Europe correspondent Sarah Rainsford explains why Crimea is a target for Kyiv, and why the peninsula matters to Vladimir Putin.
